info.name: SeatSecure API — Auth
info.description:
Complete auth flow for User, Theatre Owner, and Admin.

**Setup**
1. Import this collection.
2. Import the `SeatSecure Environment` alongside it.
3. Run requests in the order shown — scripts auto-fill tokens and IDs.

**⚠️ Before testing Admin routes**
Admin routes are mounted in routes.js. Make sure you've added:
```
import adminRoutes from './modules/auth/admin.routes.js';
router.use('/admin', adminRoutes);
```
Also run the seed script to create the first admin account.

exec: console.log('⚠️ All sessions terminated. Re-login to get new tokens.');
console.log('✅ Logged out, refresh token cleared');
console.log('✅ Pending owner ID saved:', id);

item.name: Register — Admin Role Injection (expect user, not admin)
Login — Approved Owner (run AFTER admin approves)
Login — Admin
item.description:
Run the seed script first:
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@seatsecure.com ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin@123 ADMIN_NAME="System Admin" node scripts/seed-admin.js

exec: console.log('✅ First pending owner ID saved:', id);
console.log('✅ Owner approved. Now run Login — Approved Owner.');
console.log('✅ Second owner ID saved for rejection test:', id);

item.name: Suspend User
item.description: Set targetUserId variable to the user's MongoDB _id before running.
